title: NHB is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NHB is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
